---
title: "Non-Discrimination Policy"
---

*Last updated: 2025*

## Equal Opportunity Statement

Pine Straw Distributors LLC does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion,
sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic
protected by applicable federal, state, or local law.

## Customers and Vendors

We are committed to providing equal access to our products and services to all customers
and to conducting business with vendors and partners without regard to protected
characteristics.

## Reporting

If you believe you have been subjected to discrimination in connection with our business,
please contact us at jane@pinestrwadistributors.com.
